hidden_state.wab_instruction: Fix and create email filters: repair the broken filter (wrong domain), create a keyword-based filter for a new label, and set up an auto-archive filter for a specific domain. Set up forwarding for a specific sender.

children.text: Open thread Board prep materials — confidential
Sharing the board prep materials ahead of next week's meeting. Please keep these confidential and route through my chief of staff. Thanks, J
